title: schizachyrium delavayi
intro: Schizachyrium delavayi, also known as the Chinese bluestem, is a type of perennial grass native to China. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Schizachyrium delavayi include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Schizachyrium delavayi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
